// Capabilities

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Six core capabilities. One unified platform. Built for production-grade audio at any scale.

Text-to-Speech

Type anything. Get studio audio. Four generation modes — Flash for speed, Cinematic for drama, Longform for books, Multilingual for reach.

FlashCinematicLongformMultilingual

Voice Cloning

Upload 30 seconds of any voice. Get a flawless digital replica. Generate speech in that voice across all 12 languages instantly.

30s SampleCross-lingual

Speech-to-Text

Upload audio or video. Get precise transcription with word-level timestamps. Supports 99 languages with unmatched accuracy.

99 LanguagesWord-level

Speaker Diarization

Multi-speaker audio. VOXAR identifies who said what. Perfect for podcasts, meetings, interviews, and panel discussions.

Multi-speakerAuto-detect

12 Languages. Native Pronunciation.

Not robotic transliteration. Every language sounds the way a native speaker would say it — with authentic intonation, rhythm, and cadence.

EnglishHindiHinglishTamilTeluguBengaliKannadaMalayalamMarathiGujaratiPunjabiOdia

Subtitle Generation

Auto-generate SRT, VTT, or JSON subtitle files from any audio. Word-level precision for karaoke-style display. Ready for YouTube, Instagram, and every major platform.

SRTVTTJSONKaraoke-ready
// Try It Live

Hear the difference.

Type anything below. Pick a voice. Hit play. No signup required.

69/200

Want studio-grade quality with all 20 voices? Try the full studio free →

// Architecture

Six engines.
One platform.

Each engine is purpose-built for a specific audio intelligence task. Together, they power the most complete voice platform ever built.

01

VXR-Core

The synthesis brain. Text goes in, studio-grade speech comes out. Powers all four generation modes with sub-second latency.

02

VXR-Native

Regional language pipeline handling 12 languages with native pronunciation — authentic intonation, not robotic transliteration.

03

VXR-Replica

Voice cloning engine. Upload a 30-second sample, get a digital twin. Generate speech in that voice across all 12 languages.

04

VXR-Scribe

Transcription engine. Audio goes in, text comes out. Includes speaker diarization, word-level timestamps, and subtitle export.

05

VXR-Omnix

Language intelligence layer. Auto-detects Hinglish, converts Romanized text, handles numbers, currency, abbreviations, dates, and pauses.

06

VXR-Master

8-step studio mastering pipeline. Denoise, normalize, compress, EQ, breath smooth, artifact removal. Quality grades A through F.

LAT: 0.3msTHR: 98.2%QPS: 12.4KSTA: ACTIVE

// How It Works

Three steps to
studio audio.

01

Write

Type your text — any language, any format. VOXAR handles formatting, numbers, mixed languages, and abbreviations automatically.

02

Choose

Pick from 20 neural voices. Select your language. Choose Flash, Cinematic, Longform, or Multilingual mode. Preview instantly.

03

Ship

Download studio-grade MP3 (320kbps) or WAV lossless. No watermark on paid plans. Production-ready. Instantly.

// Pricing

Simple pricing.
Generous limits.

Start free. Scale as you grow. Every plan includes identical studio-grade audio quality.

Monthly
AnnualSAVE 20%
Tier 01

Free

₹0

Free forever — no credit card required

What's included
  • 3 minutes TTS (lifetime)
  • All 20 voices
  • All 12 languages
  • Voice cloning
  • Transcription
  • Watermarked output
Tier 02

Access

₹199/month

₹199/mo billed monthly

What's included
  • 10 minutes TTS / month
  • 1 voice clone
  • 15 min transcription
  • No watermark
  • MP3 320kbps + WAV
  • API access
MOST POPULAR
Tier 03

Starter

₹499/month

₹499/mo billed monthly

Everything in Access, plus
  • 120 minutes TTS / month
  • 3 voice clones
  • 5 hours transcription
  • Speaker diarization
  • Subtitle export (SRT, VTT)
  • All generation modes
Tier 04

Creator

₹1,499/month

₹1,499/mo billed monthly

Everything in Starter, plus
  • 500 minutes TTS / month
  • 10 voice clones
  • 20 hours transcription
  • All features included
  • Priority processing
  • API access
BEST VALUE
Tier 05

Pro

₹4,999/month

₹4,999/mo billed monthly

Everything in Creator, plus
  • 2,000 minutes TTS / month
  • 25 voice clones
  • 100 hours transcription
  • Full API access
  • Webhooks & SDKs
  • Priority support
Tier 06

Enterprise

Custom

Tailored to your scale

Everything in Pro, plus
  • Unlimited TTS
  • Unlimited voice clones
  • Unlimited transcription
  • Dedicated infrastructure
  • Custom SLA & support
  • SSO & team management

All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
Need something specific? Talk to our team

// FAQ

Common questions.

Yes. You get 3 minutes of TTS generation for life. No credit card required. No trial expiry. When you're ready to scale, upgrade instantly — your work is always saved.

Absolutely. Upgrade or downgrade at any time. Upgrades are prorated — you only pay the difference. No lock-in contracts. No hidden fees.

No. Every plan gets identical studio-grade audio quality — same neural models, same mastering pipeline, same output formats. Plans only differ in usage limits.

You'll see a usage notification. You can upgrade instantly to continue — no data is lost, no work is deleted. Your projects and voice clones are always preserved.

API access requires dedicated infrastructure to guarantee uptime and throughput for automated workflows. Pro and Enterprise plans include the infrastructure guarantees needed for production API usage.

We support all major payment methods via Razorpay — UPI, credit/debit cards, net banking, and digital wallets. All transactions are secured with bank-grade encryption.

worldwide.

Podcast Producer

“8 Indian languages, one platform. Voice cloning saved us from hiring 8 separate voice artists. The ROI was immediate.”
